TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 39 

BLG_PRVDR_NPPES_TXNMY_CD 

LABEL: Billing Provider NPPES Taxonomy Code 

DESCRIPTION: The taxonomy code for the provider billing for the service. 

SHORT NAME: BLG_PRVDR_NPPES_TXNMY_CD 

LONG NAME: BLG_PRVDR_NPPES_TXNMY_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 

VALUES: alphanumeric string 
Ex: 207KA0200X =
